prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for formaldehyde were computed using DFT (tier `standard`: B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density fitting in PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 for the neutral ground state; cation and anion states (charges ±1, multiplicity 2) were computed to derive the Fukui functions via Mulliken population analysis. Most electrophilic site: carbon (atom 2, f⁺ = 0.7083913). Most nucleophilic site: oxygen (atom 1, f⁻ = 0.46742464). Dual descriptor at carbon: +0.59594709 (strong electrophilic character). Charge conservation checks passed: sum(f⁺) = 1.0000, sum(f⁻) = 1.0000. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy. Visualization: /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/formaldehyde/argo_claude-haiku-4.5/20260702-221301_formaldehyde_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png</prose>
